title: Final Variables
description: Learn the difference between var, final, and const by defining data points.
problemStatement:
In Dart, `final` variables can only be set once. Define a `final name = 'Progly';` and a `var version = 1.0;`. Update the version to `2.0` and print both.

**Requirement:** Attempting to update `name` would cause a compilation error!
hints: Use `print(name);` and `print(version);` to check your work.
Variables declared with `final` must be assigned a value immediately or within the same scope.
